meaning: vt.察觉,发觉,侦查,探测v.发现
examples: Arnold could detect a certain sadness in the old man's face.
We are trying to detect and understand how the climates change.
The new test should enable doctors to detect the disease early.
And most of city's speed cameras will not be able to detect speeds lower than 30mph.
Short of issuing subpoenas to detect accounting fraud, how can you improve your odds as an investor?
